overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking through an urban industrial and commercial area. The character passes by various NPCs, crosses streets, and navigates sidewalks littered with debris while a large bridge structure is visible in the initial background.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial sidewalk with bridge view and scattered debris

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the industrial sidewalk littered with trash and cardboard

notable_agents.action: person in red shirt rummaging through a trash can
group of three people standing near a garage entrance

entered.detail: large concrete arch bridge structure visible in the distance
red brick industrial building with metal shutters and graffiti
tall wooden utility pole with power lines
scattered litter and broken cardboard pieces on the concrete

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a gritty industrial sidewalk with a large arch bridge visible in the distance. The right side features a red brick warehouse building with graffiti, while the left side has parked cars and utility poles. A person rummages through a trash can on the left, and a small group stands near a garage entrance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner with modern office building and intersection

events.description: character approaches group of npcs near garage entrance and slows slightly
turns corner and crosses street entering area with modern glass architecture

agents.ego_description: approaches the group near the garage, then turns right and crosses the street toward the modern building

notable_agents.action: group of three people conversing near the garage entrance with cardboard boxes

entered.detail: contemporary glass and steel office building with geometric facade
traffic signal showing red light at the intersection
painted white crosswalk lines on the asphalt

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a group of NPCs gathered near a garage entrance with cardboard boxes, then turns right and crosses the street. The industrial warehouse falls behind as a modern glass office building comes into view on the left. The character crosses the intersection as traffic waits at the red light.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with wholesale stores and bus route

events.description: blue and white city bus passes by on the left side of the street
police officer in uniform walks past the character in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking along the commercial sidewalk passing a police officer and various pedestrians

notable_agents.action: police officer walking in the opposite direction along the sidewalk

entered.detail: commercial building with large red WHOLESALE sign on the facade
blue and white public transit bus moving along the street
bright yellow fire hydrant on the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a commercial street lined with wholesale stores. A city bus passes by on the left, and a police officer walks toward the character before passing by. The sidewalk features a yellow fire hydrant and blue dumpster, with various pedestrians scattered along the route.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial intersection with retail storefronts and traffic signage

events.description: crosses the street at the intersection while traffic light is green
continues walking straight along the sidewalk past do not enter signs

agents.ego_description: crosses the street at the intersection and continues along the retail sidewalk

notable_agents.action: person sitting on a bench near the do not enter sign

entered.detail: red and white traffic sign reading DO NOT ENTER mounted on a pole
wooden park bench on the sidewalk near the corner
red fabric awning over a storefront entrance

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the street at a traffic light and continues along a sidewalk lined with retail storefronts featuring red awnings. A do not enter sign and pedestrian bench are visible on the right, where a person sits watching the street. The character passes by groups of pedestrians and continues down the commercial corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a gritty industrial zone into a bustling commercial corridor. It begins on a weathered sidewalk beside a graffiti-covered red brick warehouse, moving past a person rummaging through trash with a large arch bridge looming in the distance. As the character approaches a group gathered by a garage entrance, the camera turns right to cross a street, leaving the industrial warehouses behind as a modern glass office building emerges on the left. The scene then shifts into a commercial district where the character navigates past wholesale stores, a passing city bus, and a police officer walking in the opposite direction. Finally, the camera crosses another intersection to follow a sidewalk lined with retail storefronts and red awnings, passing a seated pedestrian and various groups of people along the urban route.
